title: BI pushes ‘end-to-end’ border security upgrade
description: THE Bureau of Immigration (BI) is advocating for a nationwide border security modernization program that would deploy artificial intelligence, biometrics and advanced data analytics across the country’s major gateways to detect criminals, human traffickers, and other security threats.

title: There's a bit of good news for coral reefs
description: Scientists have used artificial intelligence to detect sheltered pockets where corals are more likely to survive.

title: AI makes Datukships easier to fake
description: PETALING JAYA: The rise of artificial intelligence is making it increasingly difficult to distinguish genuine datukship recipients from scammers using fabricated images and documents to boost their credibility, experts say.

title: Allbirds rebrands as Smartbird, names Nvidia

title: AI executives gather at G7 as Europeans seek checks on U.S. dominance
description: Artificial intelligence takes center stage Wednesday at the G7 meeting in France. Top AI leaders, including OpenAI's Sam Altman and Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis, join world leaders to discuss AI's safe and effective deployment.
content:
By KELVIN CHAN, AP Business Writer
Top artificial intelligence executives are gathering Wednesday in France against a backdrop of growing calls for tech sovereignty in Europe, fueled by concerns about American dominance in the industry.
